overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark dirt path at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The camera moves steadily through grassy terrain with distant tree silhouettes visible against the night sky.

dark tree silhouettes visible on the left horizon against the night sky
dark tree silhouettes visible on the right horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a dark dirt trail through open grassland at night. The path is illuminated only by a flashlight, revealing tall grass on both sides and distant tree silhouettes against the black sky. No other objects or people are visible in the isolated rural setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate rural trail under the cover of night. It begins with a steady advance along a dark dirt path, where the only source of light is a flashlight cutting through the gloom. As the camera pushes forward, the beam reveals tall, swaying grass lining both sides of the trail. The scene then expands to show the isolation of the open grassland, with the light flickering across the terrain before turning toward the horizon where distant tree silhouettes stand stark against a black sky.
